name: EnerDynamic Hybrid Technologies Corp.
summary: EnerDynamic Hybrid Technologies Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, assembles, and distributes structural building systems in Canada. The company provides modular building/home systems with integrated hybrid alternative energy systems. It offers fiberglass reinforced structural insulted panels, ultra-light solar panels, controlled environment growing pods, and alternative energy producing mobile trailers under the ENERTEC brand. The company also provides PWR wagon, a stock trailer customized to offer a remote site power source through its self-contained solar energy system. EnerDynamic Hybrid Technologies Corp. is headquartered in Niagara Falls, Canada.
